title: Question: Call system C module into a top verilated module
body:
---


Author Name: **j briquet**
Original Redmine Message: 1346 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello all, 

I want to call a SystemC module into a top module which have been verilated, but import "DPI-SC" isn't supported, how can i do this, because only a C++ function call is supported by Verilator ... 
I mean, i want to verilate a verilog project with some empty box (with a DPI call for example), in order to keep interconnexion between all modules, and call them models after verilated .. 
Please tell me if it is possible. Thank you all  !

j.p.
